{{< include /_macros.qmd >}}

# Data {#sec-data}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## In this chapter
<!-- The most under-discussed lever in pretraining. Where the corpus comes
     from, how it's cleaned, and how the mixture shapes the model. -->
:::

**Learning objectives.**

<!-- TODO -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Sources and scale

<!-- Web crawls, code, books; the token-budget mindset. -->

## Cleaning and deduplication

<!-- Filtering, quality classifiers, exact/near-dup removal; why dedup
     matters for both quality and memorization. -->

## Mixtures and curricula

<!-- Domain weighting; ordering effects; the honest state of the art. -->

## The data pipeline

<!-- Sharding, tokenization at scale, streaming; connects to
     `src/thebook/tokenizer.py` and the training loop. -->

## Exercises {.unnumbered}

<!-- TODO -->

## Further reading {.unnumbered}
